product_page.page_title: 95% Polyester 5% Pu bonded fabric - ArDolu - Ariteks
product_page.spec_line: 210 g/m², 95% Polyester 5% Polyurethane, 3 layer laminated, Bonded Fabric
description_blocks: ArDolu is 95% polyester 5% pu bonded fabric. The top layer is woven fabric, the middle layer is breathable tpu membrane, and the last layer is knit fabric.
The basic usage is for winter parka and raincoats.
ArDolu is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471

technical_documents.label: >> ArDolu Data Sheet
technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 95% Polyester (PES) 5% Polyurethane (PU) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 210 ±10 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp > 1000N ; Weft > 800N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp > 40N ; Weft > 35N EN ISO 13937-2 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 4,0 - 7,5 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Raincoat Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Waterproof Class 3,3 EN 343 High Visible Yes EN 20471 Technical Documents >> ArDolu Data Sheet Certificates

text_blocks.text: Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics Cloth Technical Textiles
Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics
Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics
Lining, 3 Layer Laminated, Waterproof Breatheable Fabrics
210 g/m² , 95% Polyester 5% Elastane, 3 layer laminated , Bonded Fabric.

ArDolu is 95% polyester 5% pu bonded fabric. The top layer is woven fabric, the middle layer is breathable tpu membrane, and the last layer is knit fabric. The basic usage is for winter parka and raincoats. ArDolu is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471 Technical Parameters Fiber 95% Polyester (PES) 5% Polyurethane (PU) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 75 Denier EN ISO 2060 Weight 210 ±10 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1500 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp > 1000N ; Weft > 800N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp > 40N ; Weft > 35N EN ISO 13937-2 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 pH 4,0 - 7,5 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Raincoat Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Waterproof Class 3,3 EN 343 High Visible Yes EN 20471 Technical Documents >> ArDolu Data Sheet Certificates

ArDolu is 95% polyester 5% pu bonded fabric. The top layer is woven fabric, the middle layer is breathable tpu membrane, and the last layer is knit fabric. The basic usage is for winter parka and raincoats. ArDolu is certified for EN 343 and EN 20471
